signals.headline: Sudan’s RSF committed crimes against humanity in El Fasher, Amnesty says
signals.summary: The Sudanese paramilitary Rapid Support Forces committed crimes against humanity and ethnic cleansing during its campaign to capture El Fasher, Amnesty International has alleged.
keyTakeaways: In the report, Amnesty also accused the RSF of deliberately targeting children during attacks in the city in North Darfur state.
In October, the paramilitary force captured El Fasher, the last stronghold of the Sudan armed forces in the Darfur region, after an 18-month siege.
In February, an independent fact-finding mission for the UN said the RSF’s seizure of El Fasher showed “hallmarks of genocide” against non-Arab communities.
signals.whyItMatters: The world was warned of the horrors that civilians in El Fasher confronted as the RSF laid siege to the city.

ja.headline: スーダン准軍事組織、エル・ファシェルで人道に対する罪——アムネスティが告発
ja.summary: アムネスティ・インターナショナルは、スーダンの准軍事組織「即応支援部隊（RSF）」がエル・ファシェル制圧の過程で人道に対する罪と民族浄化を行ったと告発した。
keyTakeaways: 報告書はさらに、RSFが市内への攻撃で子どもたちを意図的に標的にしたと指摘している。
RSFは18か月にわたる包囲の末、昨年10月にダルフール地方でスーダン軍最後の拠点となっていたエル・ファシェルを制圧した。
今年2月、国連の独立調査団はRSFによるエル・ファシェル占拠に非アラブ系住民への「ジェノサイドの特徴」が見られると述べていた。
ja.whyItMatters: RSFが包囲を続けるなか、エル・ファシェルの市民が直面している惨状は、すでに国際社会に警告されていた。

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: I saw Amnesty International released a report about Sudan. What happened?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: They've alleged that Sudan's paramilitary group, the Rapid Support Forces, committed crimes against humanity during their campaign to capture the city of El Fasher.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Where is El Fasher exactly?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It's in North Darfur state. It was the last stronghold held by Sudan's armed forces in the Darfur region before the RSF captured it in October after an eighteen-month siege.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: What specifically is Amnesty accusing them of?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: The report alleges ethnic cleansing and that the RSF deliberately targeted children during attacks in the city. A UN fact-finding mission said earlier this year the seizure showed hallmarks of genocide against non-Arab communities.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: This sounds like it was unfolding for a long time.

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Yes. Amnesty noted the world was warned about the horrors civilians faced as the siege continued. The eighteen months gave a long window to see what was happening.

signals.headline: Four people die in mass fan celebrations in Mexico City after World Cup victory
signals.summary: Four people died, three ⁠from suffocation, as thousands of fans crowded Mexico City streets during World Cup celebrations, the capital’s health secretariat ⁠said in the early ⁠hours ​of Wednesday.
keyTakeaways: The capital’s most emblematic boulevard ​and the streets around it had ‌been closed to traffic ‌and set up for the celebrations.
Clara Brugada, the mayor of Mexico City, expressed her condolences to the families of the victims on X and ​urged everyone to “always celebrate with responsibility, care, and empathy”.

The fans’ ​euphoria, amid cheering ​and chants, contrasted with images ​shared on social media of emergency responders and paramedics ​tending to distressed ‌people lying on ​the ground in ​nearby streets.
signals.whyItMatters: The deaths occurred near the Angel of Independence landmark, where thousands of fans had gathered to ⁠celebrate Mexico’s 2-0 victory over Ecuador in the last 32.

ja.headline: W杯勝利の祝賀で4人死亡――メキシコシティの悲劇
ja.summary: メキシコシティの保健局は水曜未明、ワールドカップ勝利を祝う群衆の中で4人が死亡したと発表した。うち3人は群衆による圧迫が原因とみられる。
keyTakeaways: 首都を代表する大通りとその周辺は交通規制が敷かれ、祝賀の場として開放されていた。
市長のクララ・ブルガダ氏はXで遺族への哀悼を表明し、「常に責任と思いやりを持って祝ってほしい」と呼びかけた。
歓声と熱狂に包まれたファンの興奮とは対照的に、近くの路上では救急隊員が倒れた人々に対応する様子がSNSで拡散された。
ja.whyItMatters: 死亡事故が起きたのは独立記念塔付近で、メキシコがエクアドルに2対0で勝利した試合の後、数千人のファンが集まっていた場所だ。

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: I saw something tragic happened in Mexico City during World Cup celebrations?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Yes. Four people died as thousands of fans crowded the streets celebrating Mexico's victory over Ecuador. Three of those deaths were from suffocation.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Where exactly did this happen?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Near the Angel of Independence landmark. The city had closed the main boulevard and surrounding streets for the celebrations.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: How did it get so dangerous?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Thousands of people gathered in a concentrated area. The health secretariat reported the deaths in the early hours of Wednesday morning.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: What's the city saying about this?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: The mayor, Clara Brugada, expressed condolences to the families and urged people to always celebrate with responsibility, care, and empathy.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: That's heartbreaking during what should have been a joyful moment.

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It is. Social media showed the contrast—fans cheering and chanting, while emergency responders were tending to distressed people on nearby streets.

signals.headline: Man who stabbed three children that triggered riots in Dublin found guilty of attempted murder
signals.summary: A man has been found guilty of attempting to murder three children during a stabbing attack in Dublin in 2023, a crime that horrified Ireland and triggered a riot in the capital.
keyTakeaways: Bouchaker used a 12in kitchen knife to attack Flynn and the children on 23 November 2023 when they emerged from a creche in Parnell Square in the city centre.
When the children lined up by a railing he attacked.
He stabbed a girl, then aged five, in the heart.
signals.whyItMatters: A jury at the central criminal court on Wednesday also found Riad Bouchaker, 52, guilty of assault causing serious harm to a childcare worker, Leanne Flynn, and of assaulting two other children and a teenager.

ja.headline: ダブリン刺傷事件の被告に有罪評決、暴動の発端となった事件
ja.summary: 2023年にダブリンで子ども3人が刺された事件で、被告の男に殺人未遂の有罪評決が下された。アイルランド社会に衝撃を与え、首都での暴動を引き起こした事件の裁判が決着した。
keyTakeaways: ブシャケル被告は2023年11月23日、市内中心部パーネル広場の保育施設から出てきたフリンと子どもたちを、約30センチの包丁で襲った。
柵のそばに並んだ子どもたちに、被告は突然攻撃を加えた。
当時5歳だった女児は、心臓を刺された。
ja.whyItMatters: 中央刑事裁判所の陪審は水曜日、52歳のリアド・ブシャケル被告に対し、保育士リアン・フリンへの傷害、および別の子ども2人と10代の少年への暴行についても有罪と認定した。

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: I saw something about a guilty verdict in Dublin. What happened?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: A man named Riad Bouchaker was found guilty of attempting to murder three children in a stabbing attack in Dublin in November 2023.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: That's awful. Where did this happen?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It was in Parnell Square in the city center. The children were coming out of a creche when Bouchaker attacked them with a 12-inch kitchen knife.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: How are the children?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: One girl, who was five at the time, was stabbed in the heart. The court also found him guilty of assault causing serious harm to a childcare worker named Leanne Flynn, and assaulting two other children and a teenager.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: I remember this triggered something bigger in the city?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Yes. The attack horrified Ireland and triggered a riot in Dublin. The verdict came from a jury at the central criminal court on Wednesday.

signals.headline: Comcast’s split could make or break Peacock
signals.summary: Peacock will have to prove it can survive on its own following Comcast’s split from NBCUniversal.
keyTakeaways: NBCUniversal executives are about to find out whether Peacock will sink or swim in the streaming industry.
In the years following its launch in 2020, Peacock was treated as an accessory to an Xfinity subscription .
But even with exclusive streams of the Olympics and live sports, like Sunday Night Football and the Big Ten games, Peacock still trails behind rival streamers today.
signals.whyItMatters: Part of that is because, unlike other major streamers, Peacock is only available in the US.

ja.headline: コムキャスト分割で問われるピーコックの自立
ja.summary: コムキャストがNBCユニバーサルを切り離す方針を固めた。傘下の動画配信サービス、ピーコックは今後、単独での生き残りを迫られる。
keyTakeaways: 分割後、ピーコックが配信市場で存続できるかどうかの真価が問われる
2020年のサービス開始以来、ピーコックはXfinityの付帯サービスとして位置づけられてきた
五輪や「サンデーナイト・フットボール」などの独占配信を持ちながら、競合他社との差は縮まっていない
ja.whyItMatters: 主要な競合サービスと異なり、ピーコックは米国内でしか利用できないことも、成長の足かせとなっている。

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: So Comcast is splitting from NBCUniversal? What does that mean for Peacock?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It means Peacock will have to prove it can survive on its own, without being bundled with Comcast's other services.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Wait, it was bundled before?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Yes. Since its launch in 2020, Peacock was often treated as an accessory to an Xfinity subscription—kind of a bonus.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: But it has sports, right? Like the Olympics?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It does. Peacock streams the Olympics, Sunday Night Football, and Big Ten games. But even with that, it still trails behind rival streamers.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Why is it struggling compared to the others?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Part of it is availability. Unlike other major streamers, Peacock is only available in the US.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: So this split is really a test for whether it can stand on its own.

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Exactly. NBCUniversal executives are about to find out whether Peacock will sink or swim.

signals.headline: Google built a great smart speaker, but Gemini isn’t ready for it
signals.summary: She covers smart home, IoT, and connected tech, and has written previously for Wirecutter , Wired , Dwell , BBC , and US News .
keyTakeaways: Smart speakers have spent the past few years searching for a compelling second act.
Amazon debuted its new hardware powered by a revamped Alexa last fall, and now it’s finally Google’s turn.

The Google Home Speaker is the company’s first new smart speaker in six years and its first “built for Gemini.” After years of neglect, Google appears to be finally getting serious about the smart home — again.
signals.whyItMatters: As expected, side by side with the Nest Audio — Google’s larger, previous-generation speaker, which was also priced at $99.99 — the Home Speaker doesn’t sound as good.

ja.headline: Googleの新スマートスピーカー、ハードウェアは上々もGeminiに課題
ja.summary: スマートホームやIoT、コネクテッド技術を専門に取材するライターが、WirecutterやWired、BBC、US Newsなどへの寄稿を経て本稿を執筆した。
keyTakeaways: スマートスピーカーは、ここ数年で存在意義を問い直す局面を迎えている。
昨秋にAmazonが刷新したAlexaを搭載する新ハードウェアを発表し、いよいよGoogleにも順番が回ってきた。
Google Home Speakerは同社にとって6年ぶりの新作スマートスピーカーであり、「Gemini対応」を掲げた初の製品だ。長年の停滞を経て、Googleはスマートホームに本腰を入れ始めたようにみえる。
ja.whyItMatters: 同じ99.99ドルという価格帯にある旧世代のNest Audioと並べると、Home Speakerの音質は一歩及ばない。

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: So Google just released a new smart speaker?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Yes, it's called the Google Home Speaker. It's their first new smart speaker in six years.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: Six years? That's a long time. What makes this one different?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: It's the first one built specifically for Gemini, which is Google's AI assistant. The company seems to be taking the smart home more seriously again.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: How does it compare to their older speaker?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Well, when compared side by side with the Nest Audio, which was their previous speaker at the same price, this new one doesn't sound as good.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: That seems like a step backward. Is the Gemini assistant at least better?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: That's the catch. The headline suggests Gemini isn't quite ready for it yet. Google built good hardware, but the AI side still needs work.

captions.speaker: listener
captions.text: So they're trying to catch up with Amazon?

captions.speaker: explainer
captions.text: Exactly. Amazon launched new hardware with a revamped Alexa last fall. Smart speakers have been looking for their next big purpose, and both companies are betting on better AI.
